title: The creeking
description: Remodels the creaking to resemble a creeper variant
body:
**This pack requires optifine or [entity-model-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [entity-texture-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) !!**

![emf,etf required!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e54d6b310fac066247f320339bb052c6cd31a82.png)

This resource pack transforms the Creaking from the Pale Garden biome into a Creeper-like variant, blending with the pale oak trees.

![Creeking](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce9111d2edae8a6633d4f2a30b210394c39fc3a3.png)
